---
title: "README.md"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/skills_db/threejs-skills/README.md"
loc: 91
complexity: 1
logic_score: 10.00
style_score: 10.00
intel_score: 10.00
overall_score: 10.00
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 10.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 10.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 10.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 16 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
- `skill-name`
